message:
feat(core): pre-compiled INSERT reuse and schema-scoped compiled cache

bd-1dp9.6.7.2.1: Pre-compile simple VALUES-based INSERT statements at
prepare() time into real VdbePrograms. The execute_prepared fast path
reuses the cached program with autocommit wrapping, statement savepoint,
trigger/FK support, and autoincrement handling — eliminating redundant
codegen on each execution.

bd-1dp9.6.7.2.2: Add a schema-scoped compiled VdbeProgram cache that
stores bytecode for repeated ad-hoc execute()/execute_with_params()
calls. Cache covers SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE compilation
paths. Invalidated on DDL (schema cookie change). Max 128 entries.

12 new tests covering prepared INSERT reuse (multi-exec, semantic parity,
explicit transactions, rollback, OR IGNORE, INSERT...SELECT fallback)
and compiled cache (repeated queries, DDL invalidation, SQL isolation).

1540 tests passing, 0 failures. Clippy + fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
